# GitHub Copilot Instructions

Use `docs/ai/create-pull-request.md` as the canonical pull-request guide
for this repository.

Defaults:

- base branch: `main`
- branch template: `<type>-<very-short-feature-name>`
- branch style: lowercase, hyphenated, short
- repository text: ASCII only; transliterate Tamil wording before using
  it in branch names or files
- inspect the actual diff before drafting a pull request title or body
- keep pull-request summaries factual and concise
